message.content:
Run ALL the following project structure audit commands in the directory C:/Users/User/citedby-ai. This is READ-ONLY, do not modify any files.

Run these commands:

1. Tree structure:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.1 ARBORESCENCE ===" && find . -maxdepth 3 -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/.next/*" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -150
```

2. File counts by extension:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== Fichiers par extension ===" && find . -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -type f 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15
```

3. File counts by folder:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== Fichiers par dossier ===" && for dir in services pages components config lib types hooks utils; do count=$(find . -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.ts" -o -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "$dir/: $count fichiers"; done
```

4. Orphan files:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.2 FICHIERS ORPHELINS ===" && for f in $(find pages/ components/ -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null); do basename=$(basename "$f" .tsx); imports=$(grep -rn "$basename" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$f" | wc -l); if [ "$imports" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ORPHELIN (0 imports) : $f"; fi; done
```

5. Next.js residuals:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "--- Residus Next.js ---" && find . -name "layout.tsx" -o -name "page.tsx" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null
```

6. Backup files:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "--- Fichiers backup ---" && find . -name "*.backup" -o -name "*.bak" -o -name "*.old" -o -name "*_backup*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null
```

7. Useless config files:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "--- Config inutiles ---" && ls -la .mcp.json .remote-tunnel-state.json .claude-context.md 2>/dev/null
```

8. Circular imports:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.3 IMPORTS CIRCULAIRES ===" && for f in $(find services/ -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null); do imports=$(grep "from './" "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed "s/.*from '.\///" | sed "s/'.*//"); for imp in $imports; do target="services/$imp"; if [ -f "$target.ts" ]; then base=$(basename "$f" .ts); if grep -q "$base" "$target.ts" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CIRCULAIRE : $f <-> $target.ts"; fi; fi; done; done
```

9. Build warnings:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "--- Build (unused imports) ---" && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -i "unused\|never read\|declared but\|warning" | head -20
```

Return ALL the output.

content.text: I'll run all 9 audit commands in parallel since they are independent (except the build which I'll run separately).

input.command: cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.1 ARBORESCENCE ===" && find . -maxdepth 3 -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -not -path "*/dist/*" -not -path "*/.next/*" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -150
input.description: Tree structure up to depth 3, excluding node_modules/git/dist/next

input.command: cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== Fichiers par extension ===" && find . -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -type f 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.*\.//' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -15

cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== Fichiers par dossier ===" && for dir in services pages components config lib types hooks utils; do count=$(find . -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.ts" -o -path "./$dir/*" -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "$dir/: $count fichiers"; done

cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.2 FICHIERS ORPHELINS ===" && for f in $(find pages/ components/ -name "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null); do basename=$(basename "$f" .tsx); imports=$(grep -rn "$basename" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . 2>/dev/null | grep -v "$f" | wc -l); if [ "$imports" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ORPHELIN (0 imports) : $f"; fi; done
input.description: Find orphan TSX files with 0 imports

input.command: cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "=== 2.3 IMPORTS CIRCULAIRES ===" && for f in $(find services/ -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null); do imports=$(grep "from './" "$f" 2>/dev/null | sed "s/.*from '.\///" | sed "s/'.*//"); for imp in $imports; do target="services/$imp"; if [ -f "$target.ts" ]; then base=$(basename "$f" .ts); if grep -q "$base" "$target.ts" 2>/dev/null; then echo "CIRCULAIRE : $f <-> $target.ts"; fi; fi; done; done
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && echo "--- Build (unused imports) ---" && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -i "unused\|never read\|declared but\|warning" | head -20
input.description: Run build and capture unused import warnings
